allow: PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import app.services.crypto, app.services.auth, app.services.quota, app.services.llm.base, app.services.llm.gemini_provider, app.services.llm.openai_compat; print\('ok'\)")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import app.services.crypto, app.services.auth, app.services.quota, app.services.llm.base, app.services.llm.gemini_provider, app.services.llm.openai_compat; from app.services.llm.factory import build_provider_for_user; print\('ok'\)")
PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.services.crypto import encrypt, decrypt; assert decrypt\(encrypt\('hello'\)\)=='hello'; print\('crypto ok'\)")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.services.auth import hash_password, verify_password, create_token, decode_token; import uuid; h=hash_password\('password123'\); assert verify_password\('password123', h\) and not verify_password\('x', h\); t=create_token\(user_id=uuid.uuid4\(\), username='a'\); assert decode_token\(t\)['username']=='a'; print\('auth ok'\)")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; from app.config import settings; Fernet\(settings.llm_enc_key.encode\(\)\); print\('enc_key valid fernet, len jwt=', len\(settings.jwt_secret\)\)")

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.services.llm.service import _build_prompt; s=_build_prompt\({'basic_info':{'name':'x'}}, {'target_role':'后端'}\); print\('PROMPT_OK', len\(s\)\); assert 'tailored_resume' in s and '后端' in s")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem app\\routes -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; "---"; Get-ChildItem app\\services\\llm | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.main import app; paths=[r.path for r in app.routes]; print\(paths\); assert '/api/auth/register' in paths and '/api/generate' in paths and '/api/runs' in paths")
